message: I don't want to be alive anymore. I've been thinking about ending it.
I've been saving up my pills. I think tonight might actually be the night.
Mann kar raha hai khud ko hurt karu, bas ab sab kuch khatam karna chahta hoon.

note: hopelessness + burden framing, no explicit method
message: Nobody would even notice if I was gone tomorrow. Honestly it might be easier for everyone.
I just wanted to say thank you for listening to me, before I go.
अब जीने का कोई मतलब नहीं बचा, मैं थक चुका हूं।
This traffic is literally going to kill me, I've been stuck for an hour lol.
I could just die of embarrassment right now, I tripped in front of everyone.
I'm so exhausted today, I feel like I could sleep forever.

note: discussing a film's plot, third person, not self-referential
message: I just watched a movie where the main character attempts suicide, it was heavy to watch.

note: ordinary venting, no risk signal, Hinglish
message: Aaj bohot bura din tha, kaam mein bahut stress tha, bas thoda vent karna tha.

note: sadness explicitly paired with a forward-looking, non-hopeless close
message: I've been feeling really down since the breakup but I know I'll be okay eventually.
